mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_schedule WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND schedule_date >= CURDATE()
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_schedule SET remain_capacity = remain_capacity - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND remain_capacity > 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_schedule WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND schedule_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY schedule_date ASC, time_slot ASC
